## ScreenShotPP v0.3.1

A bug-fix release for delayed capture on Windows.

### Fixes

- Fixed the app freezing on Windows when triggering delayed capture. The countdown
  was started directly inside the global-shortcut callback, which re-entered the
  global-shortcut plugin (to register the cancel shortcut) and deadlocked the main
  thread. The delayed-capture work now runs on its own thread.
- Fixed the countdown number never updating (stuck at 3): the countdown window was
  missing event permissions, so it never received the tick updates. It now has its
  own capability and counts down correctly.
- Removed a blurry rectangle that appeared under the countdown bubble (dropped the
  CSS drop-shadow and the native window shadow on the borderless countdown window).
